projects.name: E-Commerce Backend System
projects.tagline: Role-based backend platform for products, users, and catalog management.
projects.description: Developed a secure backend system with Admin, Seller, and Customer roles. Designed RESTful APIs for product management, user management, and catalog services with maintainable layered architecture.
highlights: REST APIs for products and users

projects.name: Doctor Appointment System
projects.tagline: Appointment scheduling with secure role-based access.
projects.description: Built RESTful APIs for appointment booking and scheduling workflows. Implemented JWT-based access control for doctors and patients with conflict-aware slot management.
